olympiad.t: n. (四年一次的)奥林匹克世界运动大会, 四年周期
olympiad.d: n. one of the four-year intervals between Olympic Games; used to reckon time in ancient Greece for twelve centuries beginning in 776 BC

olympian.t: a. 威严的；奥林匹克竞赛的；奥林匹斯山的
olympian.d:
n. an athlete who participates in the Olympic games
n. a classical Greek god after the overthrow of the Titans
a. of the region of Olympia in Greece or its inhabitants

olympian zeus.t: [网络] 奥林匹亚的宙斯；宙斯神；奥林匹亚宙斯庙

olympians.t: n. 奥运会选手; <主美>奥运会选手( Olympian的复数形式 )
olympians.d:
n. an athlete who participates in the Olympic games
n. a classical Greek god after the overthrow of the Titans

olympic.t: a. 奥林匹亚的, 奥林匹斯山的, 强有力的, 巨大的
olympic.d: a. of or relating to the Olympic Games

olympic mountains.t: 奥林匹克山（美国华盛顿州西北部山脉）

olympic national park.t: [网络] 奥林匹克国家公园；奥林匹克半岛；时间充裕可以去国家公园

olympics.d: n the modern revival of the ancient games held once every 4 years in a selected country

olympus.t: n. 奥林匹斯山, 天堂
olympus.d: n. a mountain peak in northeast Greece near the Aegean coast; believed by ancient Greeks to be the dwelling place of the gods (9,570 feet high)

olynthus.t: n. 奥林索斯（古希腊一座城市）

olyphant.t: [人名] 奥利芬特; [地名] [美国] 奥利凡特
